/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/mixed_workload.dir/benchmark/mixed_workload.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mixed_workload.dir/src/backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mixed_workload.dir/src/runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mixed_workload.dir/src/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mixed_workload.dir/src/session_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mixed_workload.dir/src/metrics.cpp.o -o mixed_workload  -lpthread
